### Changed
- Migrate sub-apps from App CRs to Flux HelmRelease CRs.
- Remove 'cluster-values' ConfigMap reference from HelmReleases.
- Add new `alloy-podlogs-crds` chart.
- Update alloy-app to 0.20.0
